description: From the Publisher 60+ COLORING PAGES Detailed pages offer hours of coloring fun, featuring iconic scenes from the streets of Gotham City, to the Batcave, and beyond. ACTION-PACKED FUN FOR BATMAN FANS Fan-favorite characters like Batman, Robin, and the Joker explode off the ready-to-color pages. HEROES AND VILLAINS Help the Dark Knight bring peace to Gotham City, and witness his iconic struggle against foes like The Penguin and Harley Quinn. CREATIVE EXPRESSION Bring your unique creativity to this official coloring book featuring DC Comics’ iconic superhero, the one and only Batman. RELAX AND UNWIND Enjoy hours of relaxation through coloring with one of the world’s mightiest of heroes. SUPPORTS ESSENTIAL SKILLS Coloring supports hand-eye coordination. Batman: The Official Coloring Book Batmobile Owner's Manual The Official Batman Advent Calendar Batman: The Definitive History of the Dark Knight in Comics, Film, and Beyond Batman: The Animated Series DC Comics: Batman Pop Quiz Trivia Deck Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 276 — 4.4 out of 5 stars 392 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,125 4.8 out of 5 stars 796 4.4 out of 5 stars 16 Price £9.35 £ 9 . 35 — no data — no data — no data £35.94 £ 35 . 94 £16.19 £ 16 . 19 Description: Go under the hood of Batman’s iconic vehicle in this user’s manual for the Batmobile. Go under the hood of Batman’s iconic vehicle in this user’s manual for the Batmobile. Celebrate the holidays with the Batman Family and Gotham City rogue. Open the windows to reveal 25 days of exclusive Batman keepsakes. Learn secrets in this lavish 400-page book which tells the complete history of Batman from his 1939 debut in Detective Comics to today. Filled with slick graphic design and beautifully rendered illustrations, this art book is a one-of-a-kind tribute to one of the greatest animated shows of all time. Ready to take on the challenge of Batman trivia? This trivia deck contains nearly 200 comics-based questions with questions at all difficulty levels.
